## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for every changed behaviour (`devtools::test()` passes)
- [ ] `R CMD check` passes with no WARNINGs or ERRORs locally (`devtools::check()`)
- [ ] `renv.lock` updated if new packages were added (`renv::snapshot()`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (roxygen comments, README, wiki) if the public API changed
- [ ] Commit messages are concise and describe *why* the change was made
